title: State Bank of India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: State Bank of India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with State Bank of India! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About State Bank of India:
State Bank of India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with State Bank of India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
